name: ADM ENDEAVORS, INC.
summary: PART I The Company On January 4, 2001, ADM Endeavors, Inc. (ADM Endeavors, or the Company, we, us, or our) was incorporated in North Dakota as ADM Enterprises, Inc. On May 9, 2006, the Company changed its name to ADM Endeavors, Inc. and its domicile to the State of Nevada. On July 1, 2008, the Company acquired all of the assets of ADM Enterprises, LLC (ADM Enterprises) in exchange for 10,000,000 newly issued shares of Company common stock.
